message:
docs(fwc): update readiness matrix — all 83 connectors now Tier 1

All connectors migrated to typed OperationInfo with full schemas
and AgentHint. Zero raw JSON operations_info() remain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
